title: A Ninja and an Assassin Meet
overview: Konoha wants to become the best assassin and it seems that Satoko's ninja skills will come in handy.

title: Daily Life of a Ninja and an Assassin
overview: Satoko attempts to buy new clothes for herself and runs into Kuro, the leader of the runaway ninjas.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin's Job
overview: Satoko tries to find a part-time job, but it's not as easy as she thought, and Kuro's SO appears!

title: A Ninja and an Assassin's Relationship
overview: Satoko attempts to charm Konoha with Kuro's suggestions.

title: A Robot and an Assassin Under One Roof
overview: Satoko is replaced by... A robot? And Konoha is none the wiser, forming an unshakable bond with the robot.

title: A Busty Girl and an Assassin Under One Roof
overview: With the help of Marin's invention, Satoko tries a new ninja skill: Breast Storage Ninjutsu!

title: An Assassin and Her Classmate's Friend
overview: Satoko takes interest in social media while Konoha is introduced to school prodigy, Aoi, who helps with her future career plans.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin's Big House
overview: Satoko and Konoha move out, but it appears they're not alone in their big new house.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin's Experiment
overview: Satoko needs to find a new iconic outfit and find out the extent of her ninjutsu's capabilities.

title: A Ninja and a Baby Assassin
overview: Marin is kidnapped and Konoha is turned into a baby! It's up to Satoko to save the day.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin's Big Dilemma
overview: Satoko's injured and Konoha takes on challenging missions due to her career and life being on the line.

title: A Ninja and an Assassin Under One Roof
overview: As Satoko waits to hear back from Konoha, she gets a few upgrades. But will Konoha come home safe and sound?
